example_sentence: El imperfecto de subjuntivo se forma a partir del pretérito.
example_translation: The imperfect subjunctive is formed from the preterite.

example_sentence: Las oraciones condicionales de tipo 2 usan el subjuntivo pasado.
example_translation: Type 2 conditional sentences use the past subjunctive.

example_sentence: Los conectores discursivos dan cohesión al texto.
example_translation: Discourse connectors give the text cohesion.

example_sentence: El registro formal se usa en contextos profesionales y académicos.
example_translation: Formal register is used in professional and academic contexts.

example_sentence: 'Embarazada' es uno de los falsos cognados más conocidos del español.
example_translation: 'Embarazada' is one of the best-known false cognates in Spanish.

example_sentence: La secuencia de tiempos determina si usamos subjuntivo presente o pasado.
example_translation: The sequence of tenses determines whether we use present or past subjunctive.

example_sentence: Este repaso sirve para consolidar todo lo aprendido en B2.
example_translation: This review serves to consolidate everything learned in B2.

example_sentence: A grandes rasgos, el B2 cubre gramática avanzada y competencia cultural.
example_translation: Broadly speaking, B2 covers advanced grammar and cultural competence.

example_sentence: Con práctica constante, puedes alcanzar la fluidez en español.
example_translation: With consistent practice, you can achieve fluency in Spanish.

translation: to make the leap to C1
example_sentence: Si dominas el B2, estás listo para dar el salto a C1.
example_translation: If you master B2, you're ready to make the leap to C1.

translation: indefinite antecedent (triggers subjunctive in relative clauses)
example_sentence: Busco un trabajo que pague mejor — 'un trabajo' es un antecedente indefinido.
example_translation: I'm looking for a job that pays better — 'a job' is an indefinite antecedent.

translation: to make a good impression / to save face / to be well-regarded
example_sentence: En México, quedar bien con los demás es muy importante en los negocios.
example_translation: In Mexico, making a good impression with others is very important in business.
